headline: Clear calendar and no inbound signals — use today to make deep progress on the 'no ground truth' evaluations design doc (AE-1079).

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake credential issues so dashboards are live for tomorrow
quick_wins.why: Both integrations are failing auth — you're flying blind on escalations and product metrics

must_make_progress.task: Draft or significantly advance the design doc for AE-1079: Generated evaluations — clarify no ground truth
must_make_progress.why: Only active Jira ticket, directly supports Evals adoption (key 26.4 deliverable) and the broader Agentic Initiative; no due date set means it could drift — own the timeline

must_make_progress.task: Review the Big Rock Agents OKR page and align AE-1079 scope with 26.4 key deliverables (evals, URT, Flow)
must_make_progress.why: The Confluence page lists evals as a key demo/deliverable area; ensure your design doc addresses the right scenarios

must_communicate_with.about: Align on technical approach for generated evaluations without ground truth — get their input before finalizing the design doc
Check if DeepRAG/BatchTransform pattern validation has eval dependencies that relate to AE-1079

must_report_status.topic: AE-1079 design doc progress and target completion date
must_report_status.note: Ticket has no due date — proactively set one and communicate it before the next bi-weekly TR

flags: Salesforce auth is broken (INVALID_LOGIN) — no visibility into customer escalations. Fix or escalate to IT today.
Snowflake credentials are empty — product telemetry and MBR dashboard metrics are inaccessible.
AE-1079 has no due date set — risk of silent drift on a key evals deliverable.
Autopilot is flagged Risk Yellow in the OKR page — monitor for spillover impact on your evals work.

outcomes.business_impact: No business-moving events captured today yet — priority is restoring visibility (Salesforce/Snowflake) and advancing the evals design doc that underpins 26.4 agent quality story.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption metrics are currently unavailable; advancing AE-1079 (no ground truth evaluations) is the key adoption-driving work in progress.

slack_summary: Quiet Monday — no meetings, no inbound messages. Top priority: make deep progress on the 'no ground truth' evaluations design doc (AE-1079) and set a due date for it. Second: fix broken Salesforce and Snowflake credentials so you regain visibility on escalations and product metrics. Zero meetings today — protect the focus time.
